arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca given huge Andrey Santos Chelsea green light ahead of crucial summer decision
arts.sum: Frank Leboeuf, who played for both Chelsea and Strasbourg during his illustrious career, has watched Santos closely this season and believes he has an extremely bright future. Chelsea youngster Andrey Santos has been told he has all the attributes to become one of the best players in the world.

arts.ttl: Team News: Legia Warsaw vs. Chelsea injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Conference League clash between Legia Warsaw and Chelsea.

arts.ttl: I left Chelsea for Manchester United but only one club wanted to win trophies
arts.sum: Former Chelsea and Manchester United midfielder Nemanja Matic has insisted that the Blues were more focused on winning trophies than the Reds during his stints at both clubs. On Thursday, Matic will face former club United for the first time since his exit and, ahead of the match, TNT Sports asked him about his transfer from Chelsea and he explained the big difference he noticed.

arts.ttl: Chelsea put €160m worth of FLOPS up for sale
arts.sum: He has only amassed 907 minutes of Premier League action so far this season and his struggles continued versus Brentford on Sunday. Chelsea have put €160 million flop duo Christopher Nkunku and Mykhailo Mudryk up for sale this summer.

arts.ttl: Chelsea blow Man Utd out of the water with Bellingham transfer
arts.sum: Chelsea are in pole position to secure the signature of Jobe Bellingham this summer, according to a report. Bellingham has long since been associated with a potential move to Man Utd, but CaughtOffside now reports that Chelsea are actually leading the race for his signature.
